queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between having no checking account and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the relationship between negative checking account balances and reduced loan default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the correlation between savings balances below 100 DM and improved credit risk profiles.
